introSection: Figure Eight was a wooden side friction roller coaster located at West End Amusement Park in Morecambe, Lancashire, England, UK.

sections.title: External links

* Postcard with a picture of this roller coaster

fullText:
Figure Eight was a wooden side friction roller coaster located at West End Amusement Park in Morecambe, Lancashire, England, UK.


 * Postcard with a picture of this roller coaster
 * Amusement Park Rides by Martin Easdown mentions this roller coaster
